Registry / Terms / measuring device

measuring device

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #03272 · 4 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 3 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 117-1:2007
#01580
T.m.1
part of the meter converting the flow, the volume or the mass of the liquid to be measured into signals, representing volume or mass, destined for the calculator. It consists of a meter sensor and a transduce
pending
20102000OIML R 129:2000
#01702
2.3
a device which measures the dimensions of an object and provides a signal to the processor from which the associated quantities are calculated
pending
202X2022OIML R139-1:2022
#03273
3.2.3
part of the meter converting the flow, the volume or the mass of the measurand into signals representing the measured quantity required as input for the measurement calculator, comprising a sensor and a transducer.
pending
202X2019OIML R117-1:2019
#03272
T.m.1
part of the meter converting the flow, the volume or the mass of the liquid to be measured into signals, representing volume or mass, destined for the calculator. It consists of a meter sensor and a transduce
pending
